items.title: Alphabet calls out new AI-related risks, as it taps debt market to fund build-out
items.description: In Alphabet's annual report, the company said AI poses business risks, including its potential impact on advertising.

items.title: YouTube star MrBeast buys youth-focused financial services app Step
items.description: YouTube star James Stephen Donaldson, better known as Mr. Beast, has acquired youth-focused financial services app Step.
